tasks.title: Admin page + magic-link auth
tasks.description: The /admin React island (client:only) and the request-magic-link Netlify Function: email checked against a server-side allowlist, a short-lived HS256 JWT signed and delivered in the magic link. /admin excluded from robots.txt and the sitemap. Auth/request half built (see plan.md status); magic-link email delivered via Resend (netlify/lib/sendMagicLinkEmail.ts). See ADR 0003.

tasks.title: Admin batch upload + publish function
tasks.description: Stage a batch of Artworks in the browser and publish them as one atomic commit -> one Netlify build, via incremental GitHub blobs + a single tree/commit/ref-update. Create-only. Full design (master/detail UI, form fields, schema drift, image prep, orphan-blob handling, publish speedbump) in ADR 0004 (refines ADR 0003).
steps: Done: schema drift (ceramics drop medium, paintings optional); Artwork-shaped types (imageData/parsed/stageImageRequest); JWT-verified blob-staging Function (/stage-image -> GitHub git/blobs); shared netlify/lib helpers (toResponse, isOnAllowList, verifyToken, parseStageImageRequest); createContextualLogger; admin component scaffold (ImagePreview, MultiImageForm success/failure, SubmitImageForm stub).

Remaining: publish/commit Function (/submit-images -> Trees -> commit -> ref-update); SubmitImageForm fields + client-side ~2560px downscale; batch list with edit/reorder; image-free publish confirm modal.

tasks.title: Per-Artwork buy button (e-commerce)
tasks.description: Embeddable Stripe/Shopify-style buy button as an island on Artwork detail pages. No standalone Shop page. Operational concerns (one-of-a-kind inventory, fragile shipping, tax) are the real challenge.
